text: Neither party may assign this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party.

recommendations.RULE_ASSIGNMENT_ALLOWED: The contract contains provisions allowing or governing assignment.
recommendations.RULE_CONSENT_REQUIRED: Assignment requires prior written consent from the other party.

text: Notice shall be deemed received if sent by email, upon confirmation of transmission.

recommendations.RULE_MISSING_NOTICE_ADDRESS: No explicit notice address was provided.
